children.text: Documenting the days of District past
We are currently rebuilding our site. This section in particular requires some work to add additional content and photos, to existing and new articles.  Please revisit for new content.
If you have any content you would like to share, please send to:

mainImage.alt: Black and white photo in a book
mainImage.caption: 2003-2004 squad

seo.description: Photos and stories of the District.

children.text: After an early start, we all arrived at the Gatwick. Our flight was delayed but we got there in the end! A quick journey over so that’s a good thing, well at least for us footy boys. We all got our rooms and soon after was lunch. Next we walked up to the happy bus and set off to the pitches where we had a short training session. THE PITCHES WERE TO DIE FOR!!! And to end the day off we went to the beach. On the journey home we showed Steve our singing skills . You can all guess how that went!!! Diner was great but I have to admit the cheese and crackers were a bit small. Anyway we had a great first day, and we’re sure there’s more to come…

seo.description: After an early start, we all arrived at the Gatwick. Our flight was delayed but we got there in the end!
In no particular order, photos from the 2016 trip to Jersey.

children.text: We knew we were in for a hard game on Tuesday. We absorbed a huge amount of pressure in the first 10 minutes of the first half. But we managed to snatch 2 goals thanks to a peached goal by Jake and a fantastic goal from Jack. After all the hye in the first half we conceded a sloppy corner and the pressure was back on. They then scored a hammering second goal and we had settled for a draw. Jake had made some great saves throughout this game and was making more great saves.But a 50-50 foul was given against us on the edge of the area they took the freekick and we were 3-2 down. We put up a good game adjacent a brilliant Plymouth side and we went out disappointed but proud.

In the afternoon we went to the beach and did some rock climbing. After that we headed to the park and had a great time playing hide and seek . After that fun at the park we headed to the hotel swimming pool. We headed back to our rooms to get ready for dinner. We were all tired after out busy day and we will sleep very well.

seo.description: We knew we were in for a hard game on Tuesday. We absorbed a huge amount of pressure in the first 10 minutes of the first half.

children.text: The blues knew they had a tough day ahead of them, playing against Potters Bar, an early kick off at 10:15. Mid-way through the first half Potters Bar went up 1-0. We kept our heads up throughout the half. Ben gave us an encouraging team talk at half time, which made us grabbed us a goal, it was a wonderful strike from Lateef which was assisted by Noah. We carried on with the same tempo, trying to score the miraculous winning goal, but Potters Bar hung on by the edge of their teeth and grabbed a point from the big match. The final score from the tough game was 1-1.
After the delicious lunch we went to the beach and got ice cream and then went to the pool inside the 3 star hotel. Now we are looking forward to the scrumpscious dinner.
Thanks for reading, have a good day

seo.description: The blues knew they had a tough day ahead of them, playing against Potters Bar, an early kick off at 10:15.

children.text: We set off for another awesome day ! We started the day off with an amazing match against Gloucester and two awesome goals provided a well deserved win for us “Reds”.
With two amazing goals from Callum and Jay we provided the victory.
In the afternoon e walked to Springfield stadium, a great experience!
Orpington v Jersey, a thrilling end to end game, which finished an amazing 6-5 victory, what an awesome game. By the way, Jake (the keeper) scored 2 great goals.
